title: hieracium demissum
intro: Hieracium demissum, also known as low hawkweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Hieracium demissum include its ability to act as a diuretic and astringent, making it useful in treating urinary tract issues and promoting wound healing. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, which have been shown to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, potentially helping to protect against chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Hieracium demissum can be prepared as a tincture or infused in hot water as a tea, and has also been used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions including fever, skin conditions, and digestive issues.
